lootNbt: {firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_bang_a",use_duration_ticks:66,nutrition:10,saturation:0.65f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"干嚼了几口紧涩难啃的能量棒"},{at_ticks:38,text:"没有什么味道"},{at_ticks:62,text:"但嚼碎吞进去以后片刻你就感觉到体能的恢复和强烈的饱腹感"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_bang_a"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_bang_b",use_duration_ticks:66,nutrition:7,saturation:0.7142857142857143f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:0,water_delta:-3,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"吃下这根扎实的压缩棒"},{at_ticks:32,text:"嘴里有一股淡淡的咸味"},{at_ticks:64,text:"咽下去以后瞬间就没那么饿了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_bang_b"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_bang_d",use_duration_ticks:66,nutrition:0,saturation:5.0f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"轻微的巧克力味"},{at_ticks:26,text:"不对"},{at_ticks:42,text:"浓烈的巧克力奶香味"},{at_ticks:72,text:"呀"},{at_ticks:86,text:"你怎么嚼碎吃掉了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_bang_d"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_a",use_duration_ticks:84,nutrition:4,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:6,water_delta:4,mode:"compat",compat_keep:["nutrition","saturation"]},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"咕噜咕噜咕噜"},{at_ticks:24,text:"——"},{at_ticks:40,text:"啊~"},{at_ticks:56,text:"我只喝可可！百时那个史一样的口味甜的我要发疯了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_a"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_b",use_duration_ticks:84,nutrition:4,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:6,water_delta:4,mode:"compat",compat_keep:["nutrition","saturation"]},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"咕噜咕噜咕噜"},{at_ticks:24,text:"——"},{at_ticks:40,text:"啊~"},{at_ticks:56,text:"我只喝百时！可可那个什么鬼调味倒厕所里我都嫌脏了粪坑"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_b"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_c",use_duration_ticks:84,nutrition:4,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:6,water_delta:4,mode:"compat",compat_keep:["nutrition","saturation"]},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"咕噜咕噜咕噜"},{at_ticks:24,text:"——"},{at_ticks:40,text:"啊~"},{at_ticks:56,text:"，！？"},{at_ticks:74,text:"可乐"},{at_ticks:90,text:"？！，！？"},{at_ticks:112,text:"哔哔"},{at_ticks:128,text:"？！，"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_c"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_d",use_duration_ticks:84,nutrition:4,saturation:1.0f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:6,water_delta:6,mode:"compat",compat_keep:["nutrition","saturation"]},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"橙色的液体"},{at_ticks:22,text:"带着一股奇异的香味被你一口咽下"},{at_ticks:64,text:"霍！有点酸爽"},{at_ticks:88,text:"十分提神"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_d"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_e",use_duration_ticks:84,nutrition:4,saturation:0.75f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:8,water_delta:7,mode:"compat",compat_keep:["nutrition","saturation"]},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"碳酸在舌头上弹跳"},{at_ticks:28,text:"有些辣有些刺激"},{at_ticks:54,text:"还有些？气泡消弭以后不剩多少液体了"},{at_ticks:100,text:"带着柑橘青柠的清爽果香"},{at_ticks:134,text:"和适中的酸甜味被你喝下"},{at_ticks:168,text:"是有点子提神"},{at_ticks:192,text:"不过我应该不会想要用来拌饭"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guan_e"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_a",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"没有你想的那么绵密丝滑"},{at_ticks:34,text:"反而因为是炼乳块"},{at_ticks:62,text:"奶香味浓的有些腻歪"},{at_ticks:92,text:"香甜的有些齁人"},{at_ticks:118,text:"不管怎么说"},{at_ticks:140,text:"总算是有点东西下肚了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_a"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_b",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:-3,water_delta:0,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"压缩饼干"},{at_ticks:20,text:"....."},{at_ticks:42,text:"罐头"},{at_ticks:58,text:"有的吃就不错了"},{at_ticks:84,text:"很干"},{at_ticks:100,text:"很硬"},{at_ticks:116,text:"没有什么调味"},{at_ticks:140,text:"也干噎得慌"},{at_ticks:162,text:"不过幸好不是很让人口干舌燥"},{at_ticks:200,text:"费水"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_b"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_c",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:12,saturation:0.4166666666666667f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:2,water_delta:0,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"红烧肉！好扎实的分量"},{at_ticks:32,text:"但是肉真的好肥"},{at_ticks:58,text:"不行了"},{at_ticks:76,text:"给我吃腻歪到了"},{at_ticks:102,text:"太油太肥了"},{at_ticks:124,text:"或许用来炖汤是一个不错的选择"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_c"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_d",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.25f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:2,water_delta:4,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"扎了一勺子水蜜桃塞嘴里"},{at_ticks:34,text:"清香"},{at_ticks:50,text:"微甜"},{at_ticks:66,text:"水蜜桃的果香伴随着汁水弥漫唇齿"},{at_ticks:108,text:"能与之相匹配的或许也只有黄桃罐头了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_d"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_e",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:10,saturation:0.2f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"绵密带沙的口感"},{at_ticks:26,text:"其实你早就意识到这东西应该是烧烤风味的"},{at_ticks:76,text:"茄汁罐头了"},{at_ticks:98,text:"说不上很好吃"},{at_ticks:122,text:"一点点番茄的味道和甜咸混杂"},{at_ticks:160,text:"但吃饱绝对足够了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_e"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_f",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:10,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"很多条被切好去头的沙丁鱼"},{at_ticks:36,text:"因为浸泡了大量的鱼油"},{at_ticks:68,text:"紧致的鱼肉也有着浓厚的鱼肉风味"},{at_ticks:110,text:"对于罐头而言已经非常不错了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_f"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_g",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.375f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:2,water_delta:3,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"第一口鸡肉被你吃下的时候"},{at_ticks:36,text:"凝成块的鸡油也被一口带进了嘴里"},{at_ticks:78,text:"非常的油腻"},{at_ticks:100,text:"鸡汤的风味非常浓郁"},{at_ticks:130,text:"可以感受到丰富的味道层次"},{at_ticks:166,text:"末日时期也是不可多得的美味啊"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_g"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_h",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:4,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:4,water_delta:4,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"切块的番茄和稀疏的番茄汤"},{at_ticks:36,text:"酸涩的口感让你身体一阵激灵"},{at_ticks:74,text:"但后来的甘甜弥补了味觉体验"},{at_ticks:112,text:"补充维生素的同时"},{at_ticks:140,text:"也能勉强填饱肚子"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_h"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_he_a",use_duration_ticks:112,nutrition:10,saturation:0.4f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:-2,water_delta:0,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"有些干巴"},{at_ticks:20,text:"吃起来脆脆的"},{at_ticks:44,text:"但带有着调味品带来的细微油香和葱香"},{at_ticks:90,text:"但无论怎么说"},{at_ticks:114,text:"吃了这东西你都觉得嘴里太干了"},{at_ticks:154,text:"必须弄点水喝"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_he_a"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_he_b",use_duration_ticks:112,nutrition:6,saturation:0.6666666666666666f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"扭一扭"},{at_ticks:18,text:"舔一舔"},{at_ticks:36,text:"遇到困难再泡一泡"},{at_ticks:64,text:"奥里给"},{at_ticks:82,text:"！！！！！"},{at_ticks:104,text:"干了啊兄弟们！嗯！美味的奥力给小饼干！"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_he_b"}
